name: family-caregiving
description: Dementia family-caregiver narrative. Tight complete-clause gold spans. Probes emotionally adjacent codes (role loss vs identity erosion; ambivalence) and a sibling-absence aside.
transcriptContent: I moved back in with my mother when the dementia got worse, and most days I feel like I've lost the person she was. I love her, but some mornings I resent that my own life is on hold. There's no one I can really hand this over to, even for an afternoon. My brothers call to check in but they never actually visit. I don't even know who I am outside of being her carer anymore.

goldCodings.codedText: I feel like I've lost the person she was
I love her, but some mornings I resent that my own life is on hold
There's no one I can really hand this over to
My brothers call to check in but they never actually visit
I don't even know who I am outside of being her carer anymore
